name: Ridley Corporation Limited
analysis: RIC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$2.8600, stop A$2.6730, target A$3.4210 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
